about.bio: I'm a Front-End Developer skilled in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. I build responsive, user-focused interfaces and enjoy turning ideas into clear and interactive experiences. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and creating interfaces that feel intuitive and polished.
